query:
SELECT u.username,
                  COUNT(s.id) AS "solves!",
                  COUNT(s.id) FILTER (WHERE s.first_solve) AS "first_solves!"
           FROM users u
           JOIN solves s ON s.user_id = u.id
           GROUP BY u.username
           ORDER BY COUNT(s.id) DESC, COUNT(s.id) FILTER (WHERE s.first_solve) DESC
           LIMIT 10
